---
title: "Publications"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(httr2)

ORCID_ID       <- "0000-0001-6229-7936"
HIGHLIGHT      <- "Goodge, T"   # as it appears in APA format

# ── Fetch works list from ORCID (we only need DOIs and years) ────────────────
fetch_orcid_dois <- function(orcid_id) {
  message("Fetching ORCID works list...")
  resp <- request(glue("https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/{orcid_id}/works")) |>
    req_headers(Accept = "application/json") |>
    req_perform()

  groups <- resp_body_json(resp)$group

  bind_rows(lapply(groups, function(g) {
    summary <- g$`work-summary`[[1]]

    # Year
    year <- tryCatch(
      as.integer(summary$`publication-date`$year$value),
      error = function(e) NA_integer_
    )

    # DOI from external IDs
    doi <- tryCatch({
      ids <- summary$`external-ids`$`external-id`
      doi_entry <- Filter(function(x) x$`external-id-type` == "doi", ids)
      if (length(doi_entry) > 0) doi_entry[[1]]$`external-id-value` else NA_character_
    }, error = function(e) NA_character_)

    data.frame(doi = doi, year = year, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  })) |>
    filter(!is.na(doi), !is.na(year)) |>
    arrange(desc(year))
}

# ── Fetch APA citation for a single DOI via doi.org content negotiation ──────
fetch_apa <- function(doi) {
  tryCatch({
    resp <- request(glue("https://doi.org/{doi}")) |>
      req_headers(Accept = "text/x-bibliography; style=apa") |>
      req_perform()
    stringr::str_trim(resp_body_string(resp))
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("  Could not fetch APA for: ", doi)
    NA_character_
  })
}

# ── Cache wrapper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cache_file <- "_pubs_cache.rds"

if (file.exists(cache_file) &&
    difftime(Sys.time(), file.mtime(cache_file), units = "days") < 7) {
  message("Using cached publications data")
  pubs <- readRDS(cache_file)
} else {
  dois <- fetch_orcid_dois(ORCID_ID)

  message(glue("Fetching APA citations for {nrow(dois)} works..."))
  dois$apa <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dois)), function(i) {
    Sys.sleep(0.2)
    fetch_apa(dois$doi[i])
  })

  pubs <- dois |> filter(!is.na(apa))
  saveRDS(pubs, cache_file)
  message("Done — cached to ", cache_file)
}
```

```{r render-pubs, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('
<style>
.pub-entry {
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.25rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.pub-entry:last-of-type {
  border-bottom: none;
}
.pub-apa {
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.pub-badges {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
}
.pub-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: white !important;
}
.pub-badge:hover { opacity: 0.85; }
.badge-doi { background-color: #0076be; }
</style>
')

years <- sort(unique(pubs$year), decreasing = TRUE)

for (yr in years) {
  cat(glue('\n\n## {yr}\n\n'))
  yr_pubs <- pubs |> filter(year == yr)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(yr_pubs))) {
    p <- yr_pubs[i, ]

   apa_html <- gsub(
      HIGHLIGHT,
      glue('<strong>{HIGHLIGHT}</strong>'),
      htmltools::htmlEscape(p$apa)
    )

    # Make the title a hyperlink to the DOI (replaces underline)
    apa_html <- gsub(
      "(\\(\\d{4}\\)\\. )([^.]+\\.)",
      glue("\\1<a href='https://doi.org/{p$doi}' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>\\2</a>"),
      apa_html
    )

    # Italicise the venue
    apa_html <- gsub(
      "(</a> )([^,.]+)",
      "\\1<em>\\2</em>",
      apa_html
    )

    # Remove the trailing DOI URL from the string entirely
    apa_html <- gsub(
      " https://doi\\.org/[^\\s<]+",
      "",
      apa_html
    )

    cat(glue('
<div class="pub-entry">
  <p class="pub-apa">{apa_html}</p>
</div>
'))
  }
}
```
